descriptions.agent-login_list: List agent-installer login tokens (the short-lived tokens an installer agent uses to authenticate against the API). Optional query filters: token, agent_session_id.
descriptions.agent-sessions_agent-logs_agent-sessions: Request that an agent session upload its current logs. Required: path agent_session_id. The agent receives the request and uploads asynchronously; poll companies_log-upload-list to retrieve.
descriptions.agent-sessions_install-imagemanager_agen: Trigger an ImageManager install on a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id. The agent receives the command and runs the installer asynchronously.
descriptions.agent-sessions_install-spx_agent-session: Trigger an SPX (ShadowProtect) install on a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id.
descriptions.agent-sessions_read: Fetch a specific agent session by id. Required: path agent_session_id. Returns the AgentSession (heartbeat status, OS, agent version, last-seen-at).
descriptions.agent-sessions_restart-imagemanager_agen: Trigger a service restart of ImageManager on a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id.
descriptions.agent-sessions_restart-spx_agent-session: Trigger a service restart of SPX on a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id.
descriptions.agent-sessions_spx-activate_agent-sessio: Activate the SPX license on a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id.
descriptions.agent-sessions_update-beta_agent-session: Push the beta-channel agent build to a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id.
descriptions.agent-sessions_update-latest_agent-sessi: Push the latest-channel (stable) agent build to a specific agent session. Required: path agent_session_id.
descriptions.backup-plans_list: List defined backup plans for the calling reseller. Returns an array of BackupPlan, each with id, name, schedule, and selection rules.
descriptions.backups_config-ini_backups: Fetch the agent config.ini contents for a specific Servosity Classic backup. Required: path id. Returns the Backup record with config_ini populated.
descriptions.backups_encryption-key-versions_backups: Fetch the encryption-key version history for a specific Servosity Classic backup. Required: path id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header (sensitive op). Returns the Backup with key_versions array.
descriptions.backups_guaranteed-recovery-point_backup: Fetch the guaranteed-recovery-point status for a specific Servosity Classic backup. Required: path id. Returns the Backup with grp timestamp.
descriptions.backups_login_backups: Fetch the agent-side login token for a specific Servosity Classic backup (used by support tooling to act as the backup's agent). Required: path id. Returns the Backup record with login fields.
descriptions.companies_agent-session_companies: Fetch the live agent session for a specific client company (the agent currently checking in). Required: path id. Returns the AgentSession (heartbeat, agent version).
descriptions.companies_backup-set-templates_companies: Fetch the backup-set templates configured for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the BackupSetTemplate.
descriptions.companies_c2c_companies-delete: Delete the cloud-to-cloud (M365/Google) backup configuration on a specific client company. Required: path id, backup_type. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header (sensitive op; pass a fresh MFA token). Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.companies_cloud-to-cloud-dashboard_compa: Fetch the cloud-to-cloud (M365/Google) dashboard summary for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns a Company record with c2c counters.
descriptions.companies_connectwise-download-url_compa: Mint a ConnectWise download URL for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the Company record with download_url populated.
descriptions.companies_dr-upload_companies: Fetch the DR upload-session metadata for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the Company record with upload pointers.
descriptions.companies_draas_companies-eligibility: Check DRaaS eligibility for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the Company record with eligibility flags.
descriptions.companies_draas_companies-instance-actio: Trigger a DRaaS instance action (start / stop / reboot) on a specific client company. Required: path id; body data (action plus instance id).
descriptions.companies_draas_companies-read: Fetch DRaaS configuration and live state for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the CompanyDraasInfo.
descriptions.companies_fully-managed-status_companies: Clear the fully-managed flag on a specific client company (the MSP takes ownership again). Required: path id. Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.companies_imagemanager-info_companies: Fetch ImageManager-specific metadata for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the Company record with ImageManager fields.
descriptions.companies_log-upload-list_companies: List uploaded agent logs for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns an array of LogUpload records.
descriptions.companies_notes_companies: Fetch notes attached to a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns the CompanyNote (use company-notes_read for a single note).
descriptions.companies_other-info_companies: Fetch the misc-info record for a specific client company (custom fields, integrations). Required: path id. Returns the CompanyOtherInfo.
descriptions.companies_recent-success_companies: Fetch the most-recent successful backup summary for a specific client company. Required: path id. Returns a Company record with last_successful_at and engine breakdown.
descriptions.companies_restore-queues_companies-delet: Delete a specific restore queue on a client company. Required: path company_pk, id. Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.company-notes_delete: Delete a specific client-company note. Required: path id. Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.company-notes_read: Fetch a specific client-company note by id. Required: path id. Returns the CompanyNote.
descriptions.components_list: List Servosity service components (status-page entries). Returns each component's current status and most recent incident.
descriptions.contracts_read: Fetch a specific reseller contract by identifier. Required: path identifier. Returns the Contract (term, signed_at, line items).
descriptions.credentials_delete: Delete a specific stored credential. Required: path id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header (sensitive op; pass a fresh MFA token). Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.credentials_versions_credentials: List historical versions of a specific stored credential. Required: path id. Returns array of past credential records (no plaintext).
descriptions.current-user_groups-list: List the user groups the current authenticated user belongs to. Returns the group ids and names.
descriptions.current-user_helpjuice-sso-create: Mint a Helpjuice SSO link for the current authenticated user. Returns the SSO URL.
descriptions.current-user_hubspot-sso-create: Mint a HubSpot SSO link for the current authenticated user. Returns the SSO URL.
descriptions.current-user_notifications-list: List in-app notifications for the current authenticated user. Optional query: include_deleted (default false). Returns notification records.
descriptions.current-user_profile-list: Fetch the current authenticated user's profile. Returns name, email, role, and reseller scope.
descriptions.current-user_start-mfa-list: List in-progress MFA enrollment starts for the current authenticated user. Returns each enrollment_id and its method.
descriptions.current-user_start-mfa-verify-create: Submit the verification code that completes an in-progress MFA enrollment start. Required: path enrollment_id (from current-user_start-mfa-list).
descriptions.current-user_verified-mfa-delete: Remove (unverify) a verified MFA enrollment. Required: path enrollment_id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header (sensitive op).
descriptions.current-user_verified-mfa-list: List verified MFA enrollments for the current authenticated user. Returns each enrollment's id, method, and verified-at timestamp.
descriptions.current-user_verified-mfa-send-code-crea: Send a fresh verification code for a verified MFA enrollment (used to obtain an X-Servosity-Mfa token before sensitive operations). Required: path enrollment_id.
descriptions.download_servosity-one-windows-list: List the current Servosity One agent install packages for Windows. Returns array with version and download URL.
descriptions.dr-backups_agent-session_dr-backups: Fetch the live agent session for a specific DR backup. Required: path id. Returns the AgentSession.
descriptions.dr-backups_agent-token_dr-backups: Fetch the agent runtime token for a specific DR backup. Required: path id. Returns the DRBackup with token fields.
descriptions.dr-backups_encryption-key-versions_dr-ba: Fetch encryption-key version history for a specific DR backup. Required: path id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header. Returns the DRBackup with key_versions.
descriptions.dr-backups_guaranteed-recovery-point_dr-: Fetch the guaranteed-recovery-point status for a specific DR backup. Required: path id. Returns the DRBackup with grp timestamp.
descriptions.dr-backups_read: Fetch a specific Servosity DR (DRaaS) backup by id. Required: path id. Returns the DRBackup.
descriptions.dr-backups_reboot-events_dr-backups-canc: Cancel a pending reboot event on a specific DR backup. Required: path id; query reboot_event_id (the event to cancel).
descriptions.dr-backups_tunnel_dr-backups-delete: Close (delete) the support tunnel on a specific DR backup. Required: path id. Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.dr-backups_tunnel_dr-backups-update: Open or refresh the support tunnel on a specific DR backup. Required: path id. Returns the updated tunnel record.
descriptions.issue-comments_delete: Delete a specific issue comment. Required: path id. Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.issues_archive_issues: Archive a specific open issue (move out of the active queue without resolving). Required: path id.
descriptions.issues_events_issues: List event-log entries for a specific open issue. Required: path id. Returns an array of IssueEvent (status changes, comments, ack-events).
descriptions.issues_ignore_issues: Ignore a specific open issue (silence alerts; the issue remains tracked). Required: path id; body data (ignore_until or reason).
descriptions.issues_reactivate_issues: Reactivate a previously ignored or archived issue. Required: path id.
descriptions.issues_read: Fetch a specific open issue by id. Required: path id. Returns the Issue (severity, component, opened_at, current status).
descriptions.report-subscriptions_read: Fetch a specific report subscription. Required: path id. Returns the ReportSubscription (email, cadence, attached report).
descriptions.report-subscriptions_reverify_report-sub: Re-send the verification email for a specific report subscription. Required: path id.
descriptions.report-subscriptions_unsubscribe: Unsubscribe from a report. Required: body data (the unsubscribe token).
descriptions.report-subscriptions_verify: Verify a pending report-subscription opt-in. Required: body data (the verification token).
descriptions.reports_maxio-price-points-list: Fetch a CSV of every Maxio price-point used by the billing system. Returns CSV; use --csv or --json to format.
descriptions.reports_product-list: Fetch the Servosity product catalog report. Returns the product names, SKUs, and billing units.
descriptions.reports_usage-list: Fetch the usage report for the calling reseller. Returns aggregated usage counters by product.
descriptions.resellers_agent-install-token_resellers: Mint an agent install token for a specific reseller (used to install new agents under that reseller's scope). Required: path id. Returns the Reseller with install_token.
descriptions.resellers_bill_resellers: Fetch the monthly Servosity bill for a specific reseller. Required: path id. Returns the Reseller with bill line items.
descriptions.resellers_bill_resellers-xlsx: Fetch the monthly Servosity bill for a specific reseller as an XLSX download. Required: path id. Returns the Reseller with xlsx_url.
descriptions.resellers_contracts_resellers: List reseller contracts attached to a specific reseller. Required: path id. Returns the Reseller with contracts.
descriptions.resellers_issues_resellers: List open issues scoped to a specific reseller. Required: path id. Returns an array of Issue.
descriptions.resellers_notes_resellers: List internal notes attached to a specific reseller. Required: path id. Returns the ResellerNote.
descriptions.resellers_postmark-rotate_resellers: Rotate the Postmark API key for a specific reseller's outbound email. Required: path id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header (sensitive op; pass a fresh MFA token).
descriptions.resellers_prices_resellers: Fetch the per-SKU pricing for a specific reseller. Required: path id. Returns the Reseller with prices.
descriptions.resellers_subscriptions_resellers: List Maxio subscriptions for a specific reseller. Required: path id. Returns the MaxioSubscription records.
descriptions.restic-backups_agent-session_restic-back: Fetch the live agent session for a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Returns the AgentSession.
descriptions.restic-backups_agent-token_restic-backup: Fetch the agent runtime token for a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Returns the ResticBackup with token fields.
descriptions.restic-backups_encryption-key-versions_r: Fetch encryption-key version history for a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header. Returns the ResticBackup with key_versions.
descriptions.restic-backups_guaranteed-recovery-point: Fetch the guaranteed-recovery-point status for a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Returns the ResticBackup with grp timestamp.
descriptions.restic-backups_read: Fetch a specific Servosity restic backup by id. Required: path id. Returns the ResticBackup.
descriptions.restic-backups_restic-env_restic-backups: Fetch the restic environment variables (RESTIC_REPOSITORY, RESTIC_PASSWORD_FILE pointers) for a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Optional: X-Servosity-Mfa header (sensitive op). Returns the ResticBackup with restic_env.
descriptions.restic-backups_tunnel_restic-backups-del: Close (delete) the support tunnel on a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Returns 204 No Content on success.
descriptions.restic-backups_tunnel_restic-backups-upd: Open or refresh the support tunnel on a specific Servosity restic backup. Required: path id. Returns the updated tunnel record.
descriptions.screenshot_read: Fetch a previously-captured screenshot blob by storage key. Required: path key. Returns the image bytes (binary).
descriptions.stats_list: List fleet-wide statistics across the MSP's book. Returns the headline counters dashboard widgets use.
descriptions.stats_live-list: List live (real-time) fleet statistics. Returns the same shape as stats_list but with current-second values.
descriptions.stats_user-list: List user-scoped fleet statistics filtered to the calling reseller's user. Returns the counters that user can see.
descriptions.users_list: List user accounts visible to the calling reseller. Optional query filters: reseller (scope by reseller id), company (scope by client company id). Returns array of users with id, email, role.
